tweets.text:
When an LLM reflects the tone of an org.

Me: "I think you missed a slash in the URL"

Gemini: "No it's an internet issue, rather than it being a missing / in the code."

Me: "Really? f"https://t.co/LB1b4KaHuM{city}?format=j1""

Gemini: "You are exactly right"

GPT-4o level.
